name: Apple-Pepper Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, stir together the water, thawed apple juice concentrate, and pectin until the pectin is dissolved.
2. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
3. Add the sugar and crushed red pepper, then heat to a rolling boil, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from the heat and strain the mixture.
5. Stir in the red food coloring.
6. Pour into hot sterilized jars or glass containers, leaving no headspace.
7. Cover tightly and allow to cool.
Makes 4 half-pints of jelly. Refrigerate for up to 4 weeks or freeze for up to 2 months. Serve with meat.
